Fever at Liberty, in primetime on Saturday, averaged 2.557M viewers and peaked with more than 3M viewers, per Nielsen data.

It’s the most-watched WNBA game of the season.

items.title: As of now, Victor Wembanyama would replace LeBron James as the youngest player in NBA history to lead the playoffs in scoring.
items.author: HoopsHype
items.body_excerpt:
As of now, Victor Wembanyama would replace LeBron James as the youngest player in NBA history to lead the playoffs in scoring.

Only has 23 points more than Jalen Brunson, though. Also: LeBron would still be No. 1 if the series goes to Game 7.

items.title: WEMBY 👽
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt:
WEMBY 👽
MAGIC ✨

With 32 points in the Spurs' Game 3 road win, Victor Wembanyama (22 years, 155 days old) became the YOUNGEST player to score 30+ points in an NBA Finals game since Magic Johnson in 1980!

SAS (1-2) NYK Game 4: Wednesday, 8:30pm/et on ABC 🏆

items.title: Over the past six weeks, Victor Wembanyama has learned much about playoff basketball.
items.author: Jeff McDonald
items.body_excerpt:
Over the past six weeks, Victor Wembanyama has learned much about playoff basketball.

If you fall, "brace with your arms and not with your chin." If you throw an elbow, "hit below the head."

The Spurs' title chances hinge on one lesson learned: "Be relentless:"
